changes: Made skill more directive: explicitly instructs to use bash+curl (not other tools)
Added step-by-step workflow: fetch → parse → present → quantify → advise
Added 'Comparing cities' section with instructions to build markdown tables and state numeric differences
Added 'Travel/packing advice' section with temperature-based item lists and requirement to connect recommendations to data
Removed non-essential sections (When to Use/Not Use, PNG format, airport codes detail) to reduce noise for smaller model
Emphasized format=j1 JSON output for better parsing
